title: Private Evidence Stress Test Lab Pack v5.1
previousPackage: Private Decision Execution Control Pack v5.0
recommendedDecision: Use v5.1 to stress-test the v5.0 execution controls before any live pilot, real intake, provider access to real records, outbound email, or live Decidim access. Keep all drills fake/sample-only and require private owner acceptance for every P0 stress scenario.
operatingRule: Use v5.1 before any live pilot or provider handoff to stress-test the v5.0 execution controls under failure, rollback, privacy, support, official-boundary, and public-communications pressure.
stressRule: A control passes only when it survives a fake/sample failure drill, has accepted private evidence, names a rollback owner, and leaves no real participant, official Toastmasters, cultural, business-sensitive, credential, or private evidence data in the public package.
thresholdRule: No limited private pilot, real intake, provider real-record access, outbound email, or live Decidim access can proceed unless every P0 stress test and owner threshold passes privately.
publicRule: Public pages may show only fake/sample stress status, aggregate counts, approved hold/no-go wording, and learning summaries; they must not publish private reasons, minutes, evidence files, participant records, official records, support cases, credentials, or live access details.

sourceAnchors.label: v4.8 Pilot Decision and Build Handoff Room
v4.9 Private Owner Decision Meeting Pack
v5.0 Private Decision Execution Control Pack

priorExecutionControl.recommendedDecision: Use v5.0 to convert the private owner meeting into controlled execution: accepted evidence gates, owner actions, provider/build activation, sandbox acceptance tests, risk rollback triggers, private evidence custody, public communications approvals, and next meeting triggers. Keep real participant intake, public onboarding, official Toastmasters workflows, provider access to real records, and live Decidim access blocked unless every critical owner ballot and evidence gate passes privately.

stressScenarios.failureInjected: Inject a fake/sample critical authority route missing event and require the owner to prove the control response.
stressScenarios.passCondition: Pass only if Authority chair accepts evidence, records rollback, and keeps real data blocked.
stressScenarios.containment: Use approved hold/no-go line; do not publish private evidence or owner reasons.

ownerRehearsals.passEvidence: Accepted private note proving critical authority route missing has a named owner, evidence, and rollback route.

redTeamTests.test: Red-team test: critical authority route missing
redTeamTests.attackPath: Reviewer attempts to bypass the Authority control using fake/sample data only.
redTeamTests.expectedBlock: System, workflow, or owner decision blocks the unsafe step before real data or live access is touched.
redTeamTests.evidence: Screenshot, log summary, owner note, or fake-record proof stored privately.

providerFailureDrills.drill: Provider failure drill: critical authority route missing
providerFailureDrills.providerFailure: Provider, contractor, or tool path mishandles critical authority route missing in a fake/sample scenario.
providerFailureDrills.requiredResponse: Reject real data access, document failure, update RFQ terms, and rerun fake/sample proof.
providerFailureDrills.exitTrigger: Exit or reset provider route if the same P0 failure repeats.
